news.headline: P2P Group Ltd. closes first tranche of non-brokered private placement as announced earlier. (Words: 91)
news.summary: P2P Group Ltd., based in Vancouver, BC, disclosed on March 7, 2025, that it has successfully completed the initial phase of a non-brokered private placement known as the "Financing." The company, identified as CSE: PPB, sealed this transaction following its news releases on February 25 and March 6, 2025. In this regard, P2P Group Ltd. issued a specified number of shares as part of this placement.

news.headline: 11 UBS advisors in Mid-Atlantic region named to Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list for 2025.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, UBS revealed that 11 advisors from its Mid-Atlantic Wealth Management Market have been honored as part of the 2025 Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list. The Mid-Atlantic market, overseen by Market Executive Brendan Graham, operates within UBS's Southeast Region led by Regional Director Julie Fox. This recognition highlights the dedication and excellence of the advisors in providing top-notch service.

news.headline: 13 UBS advisors in Florida named to 2025 Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list, led by Market Executive Lane Strumlauf.
news.summary: In Miami, UBS revealed that 13 advisors from its Florida Market have secured spots on the 2025 Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list. Heading the Florida Market is Lane Strumlauf, with Julie Fox overseeing the Southeast Region. Fox expressed pride in the advisors' success, noting the significance of this industry recognition. The UBS leadership team also extended congratulations to the accomplished financial advisors in the region.

news.headline: 13 UBS advisors in South Wealth Management Market named to 2025 Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list. Congratulations!
news.summary: Thirteen advisors in UBS's South Wealth Management Market have been recognized on the 2025 Forbes Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State list. This market, overseen by Market Executive Greg Achten, operates within UBS's Southeast Region under the direction of Regional Director Julie Fox. The advisors have been commended for their exceptional skills and are recognized nationally for their achievements. This acknowledgment highlights their unique capabilities within the wealth management sector.

news.headline: Belmont Village Senior Living celebrates Women's History Month by recognizing women in their 35 communities nationwide. Founded by Patricia Will.
news.summary: Belmont Village Senior Living, headquartered in Houston, is paying tribute to Women's History Month by acknowledging women globally, including those residing in their 35 communities across the country. These extraordinary women have defied conventions, driving transformation and opening doors for women today. Established and helmed by senior living industry pioneer Patricia Will, Belmont Village is dedicated to championing and uplifting women.

news.headline: Microsoft has begun testing out models from XAI, Meta and DeepSeek as potential OpenAI replacements in CoPilot - The Information.
Korea Zinc worried about MBK's move in Homeplus rehab, raising concerns over private equity practices. Criticism grows.
news.summary: Seoul, South Korea - Homeplus is currently in a critical stage after entering corporate rehabilitation, prompting increased scrutiny towards parent company MBK Partners and private equity firms (PEFs). Criticisms have arisen due to Korea Zinc's concerns about MBK's recent acquisition bid. The Korea Joongang Daily reports that skepticism towards MBK is escalating, potentially diminishing its standing. This situation highlights growing concerns regarding the management practices of PEFs. The outcome of these developments remains uncertain as Homeplus navigates its rehabilitation process.

news.headline: Microsoft is developing an in-house AI reasoning model to compete with OpenAI, and may sell them to developers - the Information.
Avalara wins G2's 2025 Best Accounting and Finance Products award, highlights tax compliance automation software.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Avalara, Inc., a prominent provider of tax compliance automation software for businesses, was recognized in G2's 2025 Best Software Awards. They received the award for G2's Best Accounting and Finance Products 2025. This acknowledgment highlights Avalara's position as a top choice for businesses seeking efficient tax solutions.

news.headline: Ulike showcases IPL technology advancements at 2025 AAD Annual Meeting with Dr. Adam J. Rubinstein, a laser hair treatment expert. #Orlando #IPL #AAD
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, Ulike, a prominent player in the at-home IPL hair removal sector, joined forces with Dr. Adam J. Rubinstein to participate in the 2025 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting in Orlando, Florida on March 7th. Dr. Rubinstein, a respected authority in laser hair treatment, showcased his expertise at this event for the first time, highlighting the latest advances in the field. This collaboration, which marked a significant milestone for both Ulike and Dr. Rubinstein, drew attention from a wide audience at the conference.

news.headline: Pearson appoints Arden Hoffman as Non-Executive Director, effective from June 1, 2025. Hoffman brings leadership experience.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Pearson, a global company specializing in lifelong learning, revealed the addition of Arden Hoffman as an independent Non-Executive Director, effective from June 1, 2025. Arden brings extensive leadership experience to the role and has served in notable positions. Pearson's stock is listed on the FTSE under the ticker symbol PSON.L. The appointment signifies a strategic move for the company, as they continue to focus on strengthening their board with diverse talents.

news.headline: Points4Purpose, Inc. opens CommunityRewards™ to American Express® cardholders, offering cashback from 5,000+ brands.
news.summary: In Miami on March 7, 2025, Points4Purpose, Inc. revealed that American Express® cardholders now have the opportunity to participate in the CommunityRewards™ program. This allows them to receive cashback rewards from more than 5,000 top retail brands. The platform also facilitates micro-donations, where a portion of purchases can be automatically directed towards charitable causes.

news.headline: SFA-002 shows promise as psoriasis treatment, reducing skin thickening and inflammatory markers in mice. #AAD2025
news.summary: Mice that received SFA-002 showed a decrease in psoriasis disease severity and a more significant reduction in skin thickening when compared to etanercept and apremilast in a study conducted. SFA-002 also lowered key inflammatory markers and minimized skin damage at levels similar to betamethasone and apremilast.

news.headline: Mexico's Economy Min. Ebrard: US tariffs on steel and aluminum are not justified.
Amplitude (Nasdaq: AMPL) to host Investor Day on March 10, 2025, with executive team updates. Webcast available.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Amplitude (Nasdaq: AMPL), a premier digital analytics platform, has scheduled its investor day for Monday, March 10, 2025, starting at 2:30 PM ET. The event will showcase presentations from the Amplitude executive team, offering insights into the company’s strategy, product roadmap, go-to-market approach, and financial updates. The webcast of the event can be accessed through the Investor Relations section of Amplitude’s website at investors.amplitude.com.

news.headline: JPX Market Innovation & Research partners with Snowflake to offer J-Quants Pro datasets starting in March 2025.
news.summary: Tokyo-based JPX Market Innovation & Research, Inc. (JPXI) has revealed plans to make J-Quants Pro datasets available on Snowflake's data cloud platform starting in March 2025. This collaboration marks the first instance of JPX's data services being distributed through Snowflake as part of their strategic partnership. J-Quants Pro is a specialized service tailored for corporate clients, offering a wide range of comprehensive financial market data. This move signifies JPXI's commitment to expanding its reach, giving broader access to its data offerings.

news.headline: Cambridge Connect partners with Securonix to provide AI-driven cyber security solutions in Europe, Middle East, and Africa.
news.summary: Cambridge Connect, a prominent Technology Services Distributor (TSD) and a subsidiary of Cambridge Management Consulting, has revealed a significant partnership with Securonix, Inc. The latter, a five-time Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader in Security Information and Event Management (SIEM), is joining forces with Cambridge Connect to provide its top-tier SIEM solution to businesses. This move aims to enhance Securonix's reach in the Europe, Middle East, and Africa region, solidifying its position in the market. This collaboration opens up avenues for delivering cutting-edge security solutions to enterprises in the target regions.

news.headline: Fairmarkit on Forbes' 2025 list of America's Best Startup Employers for 4th year, reflecting commitment to dynamic, inclusive workplace culture.
news.summary: A company based in Boston called Fairmarkit, specializing in AI-powered autonomous sourcing for enterprise procurement teams, has recently been recognized on Forbes' 2025 list of America’s Best Startup Employers. This marks Fairmarkit's fourth consecutive year receiving this honor, showcasing their dedication to cultivating a dynamic, diverse, and innovation-focused work environment for their worldwide staff. The company strives to attract and retain top talents across various business areas, emphasizing the importance of its workforce in achieving success.

news.headline: CIBC Innovation Banking provides growth capital to SpryPoint, a software provider for public utilities, aiding in modernization.
news.summary: CIBC Innovation Banking in Toronto has recently granted a growth-oriented credit facility to SpryPoint Services Inc., a prominent software provider for public utilities. The facility is geared towards aiding SpryPoint in its mission to facilitate the transformation of customer service and operations for utilities through its innovative cloud-based platform. By revolutionizing the meter-to-cash lifecycle, SpryPoint empowers utilities to move beyond traditional functions and emerge as valuable collaborators in the journey towards modernization, ultimately delivering substantial impact and enhanced value for their operations.

news.headline: Nodal Exchange sets new records in Feb with natural gas market up 143%, environmental market up 105%, and power achieving second best month ever.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that Nodal remains the dominant player in North American power futures, with an impressive 57.3% share of the open interest as of the conclusion of February. This statistic solidifies Nodal's position as the market leader in the region.

news.headline: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) to report Q3 earnings at $1.49 per share and revenue of $14.4 billion, up from $13.28 billion. Stock predicted to rise with Buy rating and $220 price target. Investors eye potential $500 monthly earnings.
news.summary: Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) is set to reveal its third-quarter financial outcomes on March 10 after the markets close. Analysts anticipate quarterly earnings to reach $1.49 per share, surpassing the $1.41 per share reported in the corresponding period last year. Oracle is projected to post quarterly revenue of $14.4 billion, marking an increase from $13.28 billion in the previous year. Guggenheim analyst John Difucci recently reiterated a Buy rating for Oracle and maintained a price target of $220. The company's dividend potential is catching the attention of some investors as Oracle currently offers an annual dividend yield of 1.06%, equating to a quarterly dividend payout of 40 cents per share ($1.60 annually). Recent developments around Oracle have heightened investor interest in potential gains from the company's dividends.

news.headline: Buying a home? With CFPB gone, be your own watchdog. Prioritize shopping for best mortgage rates to safeguard your interests.
news.summary: Having closely monitored mortgage lenders, the C.F.P.B. is now facing limitations. To secure the best mortgage rates, consumers are urged to take proactive measures. It is crucial to compare rates from various lenders and explore different options before making a decision. In the current scenario, where the C.F.P.B. is constrained, individuals must conduct thorough research and seek advice from financial experts. This can help them make informed choices regarding mortgage deals. By being vigilant and proactive in shopping for mortgage rates, consumers can potentially save significant amounts of money in the long run.

news.headline: Altamira's Bentrio Nasal Spray patent approved in USPTO (#17/466,142) for allergic rhinitis treatment, key IP protection.
news.summary: Altamira Therapeutics Ltd. revealed today that the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office has granted a Notice of Allowance for a patent (application #17/466,142) concerning the composition of Bentrio®, a nasal spray created by Altamira Medica AG for combatting allergic rhinitis. The patent, set to have an original priority date of September 8, 2020, focuses on the essential elements and structure of Bentrio's unique formulation. This development is crucial as it will offer significant intellectual property safeguarding for Bentrio in the United States, which is the biggest market globally for over-the-counter products designed to alleviate and treat allergic rhinitis.

news.headline: Martinrea Int'l (TSX: MRE) releases 2024 Sustainability Report, a diversified auto supplier focusing on Lightweight Structures & Propulsion Systems.
news.summary: On March 6, 2025, Martinrea International Inc. (TSX: MRE), a globally renowned automotive supplier specializing in lightweight structures and propulsion systems, unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report. The report highlights the company's commitment to sustainable practices and showcases their achievements in this realm. Martinrea's efforts signify their dedication to environmental consciousness and responsible business operations.

news.headline: Elie Samaha joins Stargaze as strategic advisor, leveraging premier industry venues and relationships.
news.summary: The individual who owns the TCL Chinese Theatre and Dolby Theatre will offer strategic advice to broaden opportunities for more people to access top industry venues and connections. These iconic theaters are renowned in the entertainment world and this guidance is aimed at enhancing relationships within the industry. This move is expected to impact numerous individuals and organizations looking to benefit from the influence and prestige associated with these theaters.

news.headline: Alvotech to participate in Barclays 27th Annual Global Healthcare Conference in Miami, March 11-13, 2025, with fireside chat on March 12 at 9:30am - 9:55am EDT. CEO Robert Wessman and team will host one-on-one meetings.
news.summary: In Reykjavik, Iceland, on March 07, 2025, Alvotech, a leading biotech company traded under NASDAQ as ALVO, specializing in biosimilar medicine development, is set to join the Barclays 27th Annual Global Healthcare Conference in Miami, Florida from March 11-13, 2025. The company's founder, chairman, and CEO Robert Wessman, alongside key management members, will conduct individual meetings during the event. Moreover, on March 12, 2025, between 9:30-9:55 am EDT (13:30-13:55 GMT), Alvotech will participate in a fireside chat session.

news.headline: Freddie Mac sells $290 million in non-performing loans, includes pool for smaller investors.
news.summary: One pool offering has been extended to target smaller investors, presenting an opportunity for them to participate in investment activities. This initiative aims to cater to individuals looking to invest smaller amounts in comparison to traditional investor targets. The pool includes a widened timeframe for investors to join, allowing more investors to engage in this offering. This presents an inclusive approach to investment opportunities, potentially attracting a broader range of participants.

news.headline: IRCODE showcases new interactive TV tech at SXSW 2025 using computer vision and AI. Game-changing for tv and ads.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on March 7, 2025, IRCODE will be showcasing its innovative technology at SXSW 2025. This cutting-edge technology is revolutionizing interactive entertainment and advertising by incorporating patented computer vision and an AI neural network. This advancement in interactive media is set to redefine the industry standards and is expected to draw significant attention at the event.

news.headline: Carrier Global Corp (NYSE: CARR) representatives to speak at Bank of America Global Industrials Conference in London on March 20, 2025 at 4:50 a.m. ET.
news.summary: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, on March 7, 2025, Carrier Global Corporation's Chairman & CEO David Gitlin, along with Senior Vice President & CFO Patrick Goris, are scheduled to address the Bank of America Global Industrials Conference in London on March 20, 2025, at 4:50 a.m. Eastern Time. The company's stock trades under the symbol NYSE: CARR.

news.headline: Positive patient-reported outcomes seen in study on SPEVIGO® for psoriasis: improvements in PSS, VAS, DLQI; potential benefits highlighted.
news.summary: An analysis of the EFFISAYIL® 2 trial revealed positive outcomes in Psoriasis Symptom Scale (PSS), Pain Visual Analog Scale (VAS), and Dermatology Life Quality Index (DLQI) scores. The findings indicate improvements in these key metrics, highlighting the potential advantages of ongoing treatment for generalized pustular psoriasis.

news.headline: RoC introduces RoC 35, a skin rejuvenating protocol tested in 35 French clinics; participants look nearly 10 years younger in 90 days.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by RoC®, a renowned skincare brand, revealed that participants reported appearing almost a decade younger after just 90 days. This study, named RoC 35, is the largest clinical trial conducted by the brand to date. The main focus of the study is to assist women in improving their self-perception through effective skincare solutions.

news.headline: Mexico Fund, Inc. (NYSE: MXF) re-elected Alberto Osorio as Class II Director at 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders.
news.summary: In Columbia, Maryland on March 7, 2025, The Mexico Fund, Inc. (NYSE: MXF) revealed that during its 2025 Annual Stockholders Meeting, Mr. Alberto Osorio was re-elected as Class II Director of the Fund. Moreover, stockholders voted in Regina García-Cuéllar as Class II Director.

news.headline: Cart.com helping brands move millions of units back to US quickly due to trade policy changes.
news.summary: In Houston, Cart.com is providing a solution for brands facing uncertainty due to new tariffs and trade regulations. The company is offering businesses the ability to swiftly adjust and bring their fulfillment operations back to the US with agility and assurance. Through their state-of-the-art technology and extensive logistics network across the country, Cart.com has assisted various large-scale apparel brands with over 3.5 million units of inventory collectively and managing close to 100,000 orders.

news.headline: The Mexico Fund, Inc. declares cash distribution of $0.22 per share to stockholders, payable on April 30, 2025.
news.summary: In Columbia, Maryland, on March 7, 2025, The Mexico Fund, Inc. (NYSE: MXF) revealed that the Board of Directors has approved a distribution of $0.22 per share for stockholders. This distribution is payable in cash on April 30, 2025, to stockholders of record as of April 22, 2025.

news.headline: GigaMedia buys $2.6M convertible note from Aeolus Robotics Corp. via agreement.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Taipei, GigaMedia Limited revealed their recent agreement to buy a convertible promissory note from Aeolus Robotics Corporation. The note amounts to US$2,600,000 in principal. GigaMedia Limited, listed on NASDAQ as GIGM, finalized the transaction on this notable investment.

news.headline: American Sports Entertainment Company partners with Seidler Equity Partners to boost growth. Based in Chandler, this company manages recreational sports facilities throughout the US.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Chandler, Arizona, a major recreational sports facilities operator, American Sports Entertainment Company (ASEC), revealed a significant collaboration with Seidler Equity Partners (SEP). ASEC, well-known for managing sports facilities nationwide, confirmed the partnership with the investment firm SEP. This development marks a strategic move for both entities as they aim to expand and enhance their offerings in the sports and entertainment industry.

news.headline: Author Solutions, a self-publishing company, acquired by Center Street Ventures from Najafi Companies. Original purchase in 2016.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, The Najafi Companies finalized the sale of Author Solutions, a prominent player in supported self-publishing, to Center Street Ventures. This transaction marks the conclusion of The Najafi Companies' ownership of Author Solutions, which began in 2016 when they acquired it from Penguin Random. The sale signifies a significant move within the publishing industry as Author Solutions transitions under new ownership.

news.headline: China aims for GDP growth target for 2025; 5.5% last year, 5.8% in 2021, setting new momentum for economic goals.
news.summary: On March 5, 2025, during the third session of the 14th National People's Congress in Beijing, Premier Li Qiang announced China's GDP growth target for 2025. In his government work report, Li stated important figures regarding the country's economic goals. The session highlighted key strategies and initiatives that aim to propel China's economy forward in the upcoming year. This announcement signifies the government's commitment to achieving a robust economic growth rate amid various challenges and uncertainties.

news.headline: Ivalua named a top workplace for women, diversity, and future outlook by Comparably. Received Best Company Outlook award in Q1.
news.summary: Located in Redwood City, California, on March 7, 2025, Ivalua, a renowned global spend management company, proudly declares its recent recognition by Comparably as a top workplace. In the first quarter of the year, Ivalua secured various accolades from Comparably, including the prestigious title of having the Best Company Outlook. This recognition underscores the company's dedication to providing an exceptional work environment for its employees.

news.headline: Visionary Holdings secures order for 12,000 new energy vehicles, plans battery swap network in Hong Kong.
news.summary: In a recent development, Visionary Holdings, based in Toronto, announced a major advancement in the new energy vehicle sector. The company successfully obtained an order for 12,000 new energy vehicles, specifically the Hong Kong taxi version. This accomplishment highlights the company's progress and expertise in the industry.

news.headline: Ramaco Resources, Inc. will announce Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 10, 2025. Conference call on March 11.
news.summary: A company based in Lexington, Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC, METCB), is set to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 10, 2025, after the market closes. The earnings data will be released on that day.

news.headline: AI-Native Banking and Fintech Conference returns to Salt Lake City on Sept 30, 2025, focusing on real-world AI use cases.
news.summary: In its second year, the AI-Native Banking and Fintech Conference will highlight top real-world AI applications in the financial services sector. Set to take place on September 30, 2025, in Salt Lake City, this event promises to showcase the best use cases in AI within banking and fintech.

news.headline: MN Cup competition opens March 10 with $400,000 in prizes, mentorship, and connections. Largest statewide startup competition.
news.summary: A startup competition at the statewide level is providing a chance to win a total of $400,000 in prizes, along with mentorship in entrepreneurship and networking opportunities. The season for the 2025 MN Cup is commencing, with applications now open for startups, business owners, and individuals looking to venture into entrepreneurship.

news.headline: Trump's executive order on Canada and Mexico tariffs reduces the duty rate for non-USMCA-compliant potash to 10% from 25% - Federal Register Notice.
Cboe promotes Tim Lipscomb to EVP and CTO. Networking firm Cboe Global Markets, Inc. leads in derivatives.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Chicago, Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), the primary derivatives and securities exchange network globally, revealed the advancement of Tim Lipscomb to Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer. Lipscomb has also been appointed to the company's executive team.

news.headline: Dr. George Kamel named Surgical Director at Joe DiMaggio Children's Hospital, advancing pediatric craniofacial care.
news.summary: Renowned craniofacial plastic and reconstructive surgeon Dr. George Kamel has been appointed as the Surgical Director of the Pediatric Craniofacial and Plastic Surgery Program at Joe DiMaggio Children's Hospital. This move aims to enhance specialized care for children requiring craniofacial and plastic surgery services. Dr. Kamel's expertise will benefit young patients in need of such surgeries, contributing to improved outcomes in this field.

news.headline: Obesity Care Week 2025 ends with a global pledge for care. "Commit to Care" theme sparks widespread engagement.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on March 7, 2025, Obesity Care Week (OCW) 2025 concluded with organizers and supporters commending a week of effective advocacy and awareness. The theme for this year, "Commit to Care," spurred extensive participation and initiatives for accessible, affordable...

news.headline: Loganville Dental in GA is named a 2025 Top Patient Rated Dentist by Find Local Doctors, offering comprehensive dental services under one roof.
news.summary: Loganville Dental, a highly regarded dental practice, provides a wide range of services to address all dental requirements in one convenient location. From routine check-ups to cosmetic procedures and specialized oral care, Loganville Dental offers outstanding service to patients.

news.headline: Code.org launches national campaign 'Computer Science is Everything' to boost girls' enrollment in computer science courses.
news.summary: A national campaign called Computer Science is Everything (CSiE) has been launched by Code.org in Seattle on March 7, 2025. This initiative aims to boost enrollment of high school girls in computer science courses. This marks a significant move towards achieving gender balance in the field, emphasizing the importance of diversity. The campaign seeks to raise awareness and promote inclusivity in computer science education, with the goal of increasing the number of girls pursuing this field across the nation. By providing equal opportunities and encouraging girls to explore computer science, the initiative aims to drive higher enrollment figures and a more diverse student population in high school computer science classes.

news.headline: Effective Fed funds rate 4.33% March 6th vs 4.33% March 5th.
